alerts.source: Montgomery County ABS ASP.NET product search
alerts.inventorySemantics: Montgomery ABS product search/postback exposes county product rows and HAL/allocated flags. Store-level modal rows remain separate and should only alert as store inventory when extracted.
alerts.reason: Changed signal for Old Fitzgerald Bottled-in-Bond in MD-MONTGOMERY: price: 142.99 → 53.99.
alerts.evidence: Montgomery ABS ASP.NET product search row: OLD FITZGERALD BOTTLED IN BOND 7YR (HAL) - 700ML (#19559) at $53.99; marked allocated. Store-level modal is not exposed for these allocated rows in the product-card HTML.
